# beacon-repos.txt — one absolute path per line: PERSONAL repos whose CLAUDE.md
# should carry the WORKSPACE-BEACON (cloud-session coverage). NEVER list employer
# repos (c8/*, cpes-software/*). The doctor checks each listed repo and separately
# reports unlisted git repos under ~/Projects as candidates — curate deliberately.
# Cursor note (2026-07-06 gate): hook layer pending verification; User Rules beacon
# is the primary Cursor mechanism until the gate passes.
